[[Category:Immanuelle's Youtube Channel]]
[[File:Video path.svg|thumb|Current video path as of November 13th 2022]]
The video path is a system [[Immanuelle]] is using with [[Immanuelle's Youtube Channel|their YouTube channel]] to maximize views

[[Immanuelle]] is working on heavily revising the video chain based on their channel pivot to ai interviews. 

Main path goes through [[Will chatGPT end capitalism]] as seen on the right. 

== Old article ==
Need to change the color coding to fit [[Alo]] sometime

* Green: hard recruiting videos, low quality but highly academic.  A single path that eventually leads to [[Reflecting on the Meaning Crisis]] and they are meant to get people hooked into careers.
* Blue: conversion seeking videos, systemic to the core of Lifeism. Ideally anyone here will be on the [[Lifeism discord server]] and possibly in the [[Lambda Covenant]]
* Red: old videos not systematized
** [[Is it okay to be thirsty?]] a good video I am intergrating in the chain
** Ritual music system idk if anyone will watch this one but it's emotionally important to me at least
** Society and desire: weird highly viewed video, idk if it will ever get views again
** All of these videos its questionable if they will play much of a role but its worth integrating them
** These videos will all likely be deprecated later on, with links still existing but no videos linking to them
* Purple: videos made with the intention of funneling into blue videos
** Some funnel into [[Is it okay to be thirsty?]] as that is considered a good video to get people onto [[How I stopped being an incel]]. This is the personal pathway
** Some will funnel thorough a political path instead
** This will likely be the bulk of the channel.[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
